name: Second Expedition into Danger!
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>第</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>弐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>次</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>未</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>み</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>域</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>探</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>険</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>隊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Discard 1 card, then target 1 "Danger!" monster you control; it gains 500 ATK/DEF until the end of this turn. If this card is in the GY: You can discard 1 "Danger!" monster; place this card on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Second Expedition into Danger!" once per turn.
eff: Discard 1 card, then target 1 "Danger!" monster you control; it gains 500 ATK/DEF until the end of this turn. If this card is in the GY: You can discard 1 "Danger!" monster; place this card on the bottom of the Deck, then draw 1 card. You can only use each effect of "Second Expedition into Danger!" once per turn.

action: Returns itself from Graveyard to Deck
